blockers.description: Three rounds of freeze block layout fixes not yet UAT-confirmed in live Nuke
blockers.workaround: none — requires live Nuke with freeze blocks and normal trees

human_actions_pending.action: Run live Nuke UAT with three test cases: (1) horizontal layout with freeze block — verify left margin, no overlap with upstream subtree; (2) vertical layout with freeze block — verify downstream subtrees NOT pushed right; (3) normal non-freeze layout — verify no regression.
human_actions_pending.context: This session added four changes on top of the prior 3-tuple refactor: (a) place_subtree_horizontal now receives freeze_block_sizes and passes it to all compute_dims calls; (b) effective_widths/left_extents in horizontal spine use side_root_x_offset for correct left/right extent; (c) spine nodes that ARE freeze block roots expand effective_widths/left_extents to cover full block bbox; (d) layout_selected computes bbox_before BEFORE filtering out non-root freeze members, preventing spurious grew_right; (e) push_nodes_to_make_room has Y-overlap guard on push-right condition. Also added missing freeze_block_sizes construction in _layout_selected_horizontal_impl. All 335 tests pass.

decisions.decision: compute_dims returns 3-tuple (W, H, root_x_offset) instead of 2-tuple
decisions.rationale: Eliminates freeze_block_sizes side channel from place_subtree. root_x_offset=0 for normal nodes — zero behavioral change.

decisions.decision: place_subtree centers ROOT NODE above consumer, not allocation band width
decisions.rationale: Centering by allocation width causes cascading leftward drift in deep chains.

decisions.decision: Spine nodes that ARE freeze block roots expand effective_widths/left_extents
decisions.rationale: Without this, the spine advance formula only reserves screenWidth() for the root node; non-root block members (restored via offset) overlap adjacent spine subtrees.
Nodes fully above or below the subtree footprint cannot collide horizontally — pushing them right is unnecessary and visually disruptive, especially with wide freeze blocks.

decisions.decision: bbox_before in layout_selected computed before filtering non-root freeze members
decisions.rationale: bbox_after includes freeze members (from collect_subtree_nodes), so bbox_before must too — otherwise grew_right is spuriously True.

next_action: Run live Nuke UAT — test horizontal freeze block margin, vertical push-right, and normal layout regression. If passes, commit and push.
context_notes: Session 3 of freeze block layout fixes. User reported two remaining issues after the 3-tuple refactor: (1) horizontal layout insufficient left margin on freeze group, (2) vertical layout pushing downstream subtrees right. Root causes: (1) place_subtree_horizontal never passed freeze_block_sizes to compute_dims, AND spine nodes that are freeze block roots only contributed screenWidth() to effective_widths — missing block extent; (2) layout_selected computed bbox_before from filtered selected_nodes (missing non-root freeze members) while bbox_after included them, causing false grew_right. Also added Y-overlap guard to push_nodes_to_make_room as defense-in-depth. First attempt fixed side-subtree compute_dims but missed spine-node-IS-the-block-root case and _layout_selected_horizontal_impl lacking freeze_block_sizes entirely (NameError). Second attempt added spine effective_widths expansion and bbox_before fix.
